message:
bd-cisk: Add snapshot tests for demo_showcase scenes

- New test file: tests/demo_showcase_snapshots.rs
- Snapshots for: debug_tools, traceback, table, hero, scene_list
- Timestamp normalization for stable snapshots (filters µs values)
- Uses insta for snapshot management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand unit tests inside `src/bin/demo_showcase.rs` to cover:
- default config values (including derived defaults like interactive/live/screen auto modes)
- parsing of numeric flags (`--speed`, `--width`, `--height`, `--seed`)
- boolean flag pairs (`--foo` / `--no-foo`)
- mutual exclusion rules (e.g. `--export` vs `--export-dir`)
- friendly error messages

## Acceptance criteria

- Tests are deterministic and do not require a TTY.
- Test failures point directly to the CLI regression.

- When `--export` or `--export-dir` is set, run the demo with capture enabled:
  - `console.begin_capture()`
  - run selected scenes
  - then call `export_html` / `export_svg`

Be careful: capture + Live/alt-screen don't mix well. For export runs, prefer non-live mode (static output).

## Acceptance criteria

- Export run produces stable artifacts without requiring a TTY.

@@ -0,0 +1,180 @@
+//! Snapshot tests for demo_showcase scenes.
+//!
+//! These tests capture the expected output of various scenes and detect
+//! visual regressions using insta snapshots.
+//!
+//! ## Running Tests
+//!
+//! ```bash
+//! # Run all snapshot tests
+//! cargo test --test demo_showcase_snapshots
+//!
+//! # Update snapshots when intentional changes are made
+//! cargo insta test --accept -- --test demo_showcase_snapshots
+//!
+//! # Review pending snapshots interactively
+//! cargo insta review
+//! ```
+
+mod common;
+mod demo_showcase_harness;
+
+use demo_showcase_harness::{DemoRunner, assertions::*};
+
+/// Strip ANSI escape codes for text-only snapshot comparison.
+fn strip_ansi(s: &str) -> String {
+    let ansi_regex = regex::Regex::new(r"\x1b\[[0-9;]*m").unwrap();
+    ansi_regex.replace_all(s, "").to_string()
+}
+
+/// Normalize output for stable snapshots:
+/// - Strip ANSI codes
+/// - Normalize line endings
+/// - Trim trailing whitespace from lines
+/// - Filter out lines containing time-varying values (elapsed, timestamps)
+fn normalize_for_snapshot(s: &str) -> String {
+    // Regex to match microsecond timestamp values like "12.313µs"
+    let timestamp_regex = regex::Regex::new(r"\d+\.\d+µs").unwrap();
+
+    strip_ansi(s)
+        .lines()
+        .filter(|line| !line.contains("elapsed"))
+        .filter(|line| !timestamp_regex.is_match(line))
+        .map(|line| line.trim_end())
+        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
+        .join("\n")
+}
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Debug Tools Scene Snapshots
+// ============================================================================
+
+#[test]
+fn snapshot_debug_tools_scene() {
+    common::init_test_logging();
+
+    let result = DemoRunner::new()
+        .arg("--scene")
+        .arg("debug_tools")
+        .arg("--quick")
+        .arg("--seed")
+        .arg("42")
+        .arg("--color-system")
+        .arg("none")
+        .arg("--no-interactive")
+        .timeout_secs(15)
+        .run()
+        .expect("should run");
+
+    assert_success(&result);
+    assert_no_timeout(&result);
+
+    let normalized = normalize_for_snapshot(&result.stdout);
+    insta::assert_snapshot!("debug_tools_scene", normalized);
+}
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Traceback Scene Snapshots
+// ============================================================================
+
+#[test]
+fn snapshot_traceback_scene() {
+    common::init_test_logging();
+
+    let result = DemoRunner::new()
+        .arg("--scene")
+        .arg("traceback")
+        .arg("--quick")
+        .arg("--seed")
+        .arg("42")
+        .arg("--color-system")
+        .arg("none")
+        .arg("--no-interactive")
+        .timeout_secs(15)
+        .run()
+        .expect("should run");
+
+    assert_success(&result);
+    assert_no_timeout(&result);
+
+    let normalized = normalize_for_snapshot(&result.stdout);
+    insta::assert_snapshot!("traceback_scene", normalized);
+}
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Table Scene Snapshots
+// ============================================================================
+
+#[test]
+fn snapshot_table_scene() {
+    common::init_test_logging();
+
+    let result = DemoRunner::new()
+        .arg("--scene")
+        .arg("table")
+        .arg("--quick")
+        .arg("--seed")
+        .arg("42")
+        .arg("--color-system")
+        .arg("none")
+        .arg("--no-interactive")
+        .timeout_secs(15)
+        .run()
+        .expect("should run");
+
+    assert_success(&result);
+    assert_no_timeout(&result);
+
+    let normalized = normalize_for_snapshot(&result.stdout);
+    insta::assert_snapshot!("table_scene", normalized);
+}
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Hero Scene Snapshots
+// ============================================================================
+
+#[test]
+fn snapshot_hero_scene() {
+    common::init_test_logging();
+
+    let result = DemoRunner::new()
+        .arg("--scene")
+        .arg("hero")
+        .arg("--quick")
+        .arg("--seed")
+        .arg("42")
+        .arg("--color-system")
+        .arg("none")
+        .arg("--no-interactive")
+        .timeout_secs(15)
+        .run()
+        .expect("should run");
+
+    assert_success(&result);
+    assert_no_timeout(&result);
+
+    let normalized = normalize_for_snapshot(&result.stdout);
+    insta::assert_snapshot!("hero_scene", normalized);
+}
+
+// ============================================================================
+// Scene List Snapshot
+// ============================================================================
+
+#[test]
+fn snapshot_scene_list() {
+    common::init_test_logging();
+
+    let result = DemoRunner::new()
+        .arg("--list-scenes")
+        .arg("--color-system")
+        .arg("none")
+        .timeout_secs(10)
+        .run()
+        .expect("should run");
+
+    assert_success(&result);
+
+    let normalized = normalize_for_snapshot(&result.stdout);
+    insta::assert_snapshot!("scene_list", normalized);
+}

+---
+source: tests/demo_showcase_snapshots.rs
+expression: normalized
+---
+Debug Tools: Pretty & Inspect
+
+rich_rust provides debugging tools for inspecting Rust values.
+
+Pretty: Styled Debug Output
+
+ServiceInfo struct:
+
+ServiceInfo {
+    name: "api",
+    health: Ok,
+    latency: 12ms,
+    version: "1.2.3",
+}
+Pretty uses the Debug trait to render values with optional wrapping.
+
+Inspect: Value + Type Information
+
+DemoStateSnapshot (partial):
+
+Type: demo_showcase::state::DemoStateSnapshot
+┏━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
+┃ Field    ┃ Value                             ┃
+┡━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
+│ run_id   │ 42                                │
+│ seed     │ 12345                             │
+│ headline │ "Booting Nebula Deploy…"          │
+│ services │ [                                 │
+│ name     │ "api"                             │
+│ health   │ Ok                                │
+│ latency  │ 12ms                              │
+│ version  │ "1.2.3"                           │
+│ name     │ "worker"                          │
+│ health   │ Warn                              │
+│ latency  │ 48ms                              │
+│ version  │ "1.2.3"                           │
+│ name     │ "db"                              │
+│ health   │ Err                               │
+│ latency  │ 0ns                               │
+│ version  │ "13.4"                            │
+│ pipeline │ [                                 │
+│ name     │ "plan"                            │
+│ status   │ Done                              │
+│ progress │ 1.0                               │
+│ eta      │ None                              │
+│ name     │ "deploy"                          │
+│ status   │ Running                           │
+│ progress │ 0.42                              │
+│ eta      │ Some(                             │
+│ name     │ "verify"                          │
+│ status   │ Pending                           │
+│ progress │ 0.0                               │
+│ eta      │ None                              │
+│ name     │ "cleanup"                         │
+│ status   │ Failed                            │
+│ progress │ 0.0                               │
+│ eta      │ None                              │
+│ logs     │ [                                 │
+│ level    │ Info                              │
+│ message  │ "svc api: OK (12ms) v1.2.3"       │
+│ level    │ Info                              │
+│ message  │ "svc worker: WARN (48ms) v1.2.3"  │
+│ level    │ Info                              │
+│ message  │ "svc db: ERR (0ms) v13.4"         │
+│ level    │ Debug                             │
+│ message  │ "stage plan -> done"              │
+│ level    │ Debug                             │
+│ message  │ "stage deploy -> running eta=12s" │
+│ level    │ Debug                             │
+│ message  │ "stage verify -> pending"         │
+│ level    │ Debug                             │
+│ message  │ "stage cleanup -> failed"         │

+│ message  │ "ERROR: demo log line"            │
+│ failure  │ None                              │
+└──────────┴───────────────────────────────────┘
+
+Inspect shows the Rust type name and extracts struct fields.
+

+

+
+[

+---
+source: tests/demo_showcase_snapshots.rs
+expression: normalized
+---
+                                Available Scenes
+┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
+┃ Scene             ┃ Description                                              ┃
+┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
+│ hero              │ Introduce Nebula Deploy and the visual brand.            │
+│ dashboard         │ Live split-screen dashboard (services + pipeline +       │
+│                   │ logs).                                                   │
+│ deep_dive_markdow │ Runbook / release notes (feature: markdown).             │
+│ n                 │                                                          │
+│ deep_dive_syntax  │ Config/code snippet view (feature: syntax).              │
+│ deep_dive_json    │ API payload view (feature: json).                        │
+│ table             │ Table showcase: styles, alignment, badges, and ASCII     │
+│                   │ fallback.                                                │
+│ debug_tools       │ Pretty/Inspect + Traceback + RichLogger (+ tracing).     │
+│ traceback         │ Controlled error with Traceback + exception panel.       │
+│ export            │ Export HTML/SVG bundle.                                  │
+│ outro             │ Summary + next steps.                                    │
+└───────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
+
+Run with --scene <name> to run a single scene.

+---
+source: tests/demo_showcase_snapshots.rs
+expression: normalized
+---
+Tables: Structured Data Display
+
+Tables organize data with headers, alignment, and styling.
+
+Service Status Table
+
+                       Services
+┏━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━┓
+┃ Service    ┃  Region   ┃ Version ┃ Latency ┃ Status ┃
+┡━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━┩
+│ api        │ us-west-2 │  2.4.1  │    12ms │   OK   │
+│ auth       │ us-west-2 │  1.9.0  │     8ms │   OK   │
+│ db         │ us-west-2 │  3.2.0  │    45ms │  WARN  │
+│ cache      │ us-west-2 │  1.0.5  │     2ms │   OK   │
+│ worker     │ us-west-2 │  2.1.3  │    23ms │   OK   │
+└────────────┴───────────┴─────────┴─────────┴────────┘
+
+Status badges use markup for semantic coloring.
+
+Metrics Table (Numeric Alignment)
+
+                           System Metrics
+┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━┓
+┃ Metric          ┃    Current ┃    Average ┃       Peak ┃  Status  ┃
+┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━┩
+│ CPU Usage       │        42% │        38% │        89% │  Normal  │
+│ Memory          │     6.2 GB │     5.8 GB │     7.9 GB │  Normal  │
+│ Disk I/O        │   145 MB/s │    98 MB/s │   312 MB/s │ Elevated │
+│ Network         │   1.2 Gbps │   0.8 Gbps │   2.1 Gbps │  Normal  │
+│ Connections     │        847 │        623 │      1,204 │  Normal  │
+└─────────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴────────────┴──────────┘
+
+Right-justified columns align numeric values for easy comparison.
+
+ASCII Fallback Mode
+
+For terminals without Unicode support:
+
+             Deployment History
++----------+----------+----------+----------+
+| ID       |   Time   | Duration |  Result  |
+|----------+----------+----------+----------|
+| d-7f3a2b | 14:32:05 |   2m 15s | Success  |
+| d-8e2c1a | 13:45:22 |   1m 48s | Success  |
+| d-6d4b9c | 12:18:41 |   3m 02s | Rollback |
+| d-5a3e8f | 11:05:33 |   2m 31s | Success  |
++----------+----------+----------+----------+
+
+ASCII mode uses +, -, and | for borders (works everywhere).

+Traceback: Error Visualization
+
+When things go wrong, rich_rust helps you see what happened.
+
+Log Escalation
+
+45.000s  INFO  Starting deployment validation...
+46.000s  INFO  Checking service dependencies...
+47.000s  WARN  Connection pool nearing capacity (8/10)
+48.000s  WARN  Query latency exceeding threshold: 450ms
+49.000s ERROR  Connection timeout after 30s - aborting
+Exception Traceback
+
+╭───────────────────── Traceback (most recent call last) ──────────────────────╮
+│ src/db/pool.rs:142 in nebula::db::pool::acquire                              │
+│                                                                              │
+│   140     // Function: acquire                                               │
+│   141     let result = operation()?;                                         │
+│ ❱ 142     process(result)?;                                                  │
+│   143     Ok(())                                                             │
+│ src/db/connection.rs:87 in nebula::db::Connection::connect                   │
+│                                                                              │
+│   85     let pool = ConnectionPool::new(config)?;                            │
+│   86     pool.set_timeout(Duration::from_secs(30));                          │
+│ ❱ 87     pool.connect().await?;  // <-- timeout here                         │
+│   88     Ok(pool)                                                            │
+│ src/deploy/cleanup.rs:203 in nebula::deploy::cleanup::mark_complete          │
+│                                                                              │
+│   201     let conn = self.pool.get().await?;                                 │
+│   202     conn.execute(UPDATE_QUERY, &[&deployment_id])?;                    │
+│ ❱ 203     self.notify_completion(deployment_id)?;                            │
+│   204     Ok(())                                                             │
+│ src/pipeline/stage.rs:56 in nebula::pipeline::Stage::run                     │
+│                                                                              │
+│   54     info!("Starting stage: {}", self.name);                             │
+│   55     self.pre_checks()?;                                                 │
+│ ❱ 56     self.execute_tasks().await?;                                        │
+│   57     self.post_checks()?;                                                │
+╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
+DatabaseConnectionError: Connection to database timed out after 30s (max_retries=3 exhausted)
+
+Tracebacks show the call stack with source context and the exception message.
